# BP-161 positive: a test opens a literal production database target.
lang: go
file: BP-161-vulnerable_test.go
variant: production-sql-dsn
---
package dbtest

import (
	"database/sql"
	"testing"
)

func TestDatabase(t *testing.T) {
	db, err := sql.Open("postgres", "postgres://app:secret@prod-db.internal:5432/orders")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	_ = db
}
